definitions.name: Court of the Unfinished Finish
definitions.summary: Copper rings and preserved wheel marks arbitrate races whose endings remain mobile.

features.name: yesterday wheel impression
features.description: The clay holds a winning wheel that will not arrive until tomorrow.

features.name: public oath rail
features.description: Copper rings tighten around any promise stated merely for applause.

features.name: disputed finish tapestry
features.description: Dust-colored thread rearranges the leaders whenever nobody argues.
